policy: These cases protect current runtime reachability only. They do not attest naturalness, productivity, construction identity, clause linkage, directional constituency, stative structure, passive or permissive interpretation, imperative licensing, progressive word order, purpose relations, or promotion eligibility.

cases.scope_note: Protects the current CompletionVP plus 就 sequence only; component evidence does not establish the dedicated wrapper, subject-sharing policy, or unrestricted completion-then productivity.
Protects the exact 返上嚟 route only; attestation of compound directionals does not validate arbitrary combinations, identical constituency, or the broad runtime label.
Protects the current action plus 就 plus stative-result route only; it does not establish a general conditional analysis or license every clause containing 就.
Protects the current degree 好 plus dictionary-backed lexicalized 好食 tokenization only; it does not establish a productive class or settle compositional versus lexical analysis.
Protects the dictionary-backed 難食 route only; it does not equate lexical 難X forms with productive 唔 plus stative negation or validate the label as a general construction.
Protects the current transparent 畀 relation while preserving passive and permissive ambiguity; the probe does not select one reading or establish unrestricted argument structures.
Protects the narrow 請 plus addressee plus 沿住 path plus predicate route only; it does not establish a broad polite-imperative construction or generalize beyond path commands.
Protects the current progressive predicate followed by a location question route only; it does not establish this word order as preferred or a special progressive-place construction.
Protects the exact seven-node progressive-plus-adjacent-VP wrapper only; adjacency does not independently establish purpose, event unity, or a fixed progressive-purpose template.
Protects the nested 洗緊菜 child inside the bounded parent only; independently supported V緊O structure does not require this dedicated internal child label.
Protects the nested 煮飯 child assigned by the parent only; V plus object form alone does not identify a purpose predicate or license an inferred purpose relation.
